title: HAIX Teams Receive Honorable Mentions at NYCU CS Undergraduate Project Contest
content: Congratulations to our students: both HAIX Lab teams that advanced to the final round of the NYCU Department of Computer Science Undergraduate Project Contest received Honorable Mention awards. 🎉

title: Lab Gathering
content: We had our lab gathering on March 30, launched the lab website, and finalized our lab name as HAIX (Human AI & Creative Computing) Lab.

title: Student Recruitment
content: Prof. Grace Yen is looking for motivated undergraduate and graduate students to join the group. If you are interested, please email yyen@nycu.edu.tw with your CV, transcripts, and a short note on why you want to work with us.
